type: CLAIM
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Adding error_threshold parameter to Image.quantize() to allow MSE-based early stopping of color quantization

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Finished error_threshold param: added it as last kwarg to quantize() signature, new logic block right before 'im = self._new(self.im.quantize(colors, method, kmeans))' at line ~1119, plus test_quantize_error_threshold test before test_rgba_quantize. Signature is now multi-line (one arg per line) since it exceeds 88 chars - please rebase your sort_palette addition on top of that multi-line form to avoid a merge clash.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py
summary: Finished sort_palette: already used multi-line quantize() signature ending in 'sort_palette=None,'; added new _sort_palette() helper method right after quantize() (before remap_palette), and call sites 'if sort_palette: ...' inserted right before both 'return new_im' (palette= branch) and before 'return im' (normal branch) around line 1121-1131. No changes to error_threshold logic area other than the signature line itself.
